What we offer

Our Grooming Services

Every dog is individual — we tailor every session to your dog's needs, temperament and breed.

🛀

Full Groom

Bath, blow-dry and a breed-appropriate cut tailored to your preferences. Sent home looking and smelling wonderful.

🐾

Gentle Grooming

Patient, calm sessions for timid and older dogs. We take all the time needed to build trust and keep your dog at ease.

✂️

Breed-Specific Cuts

Spaniels, Poodles, Doodles, Shih Tzus and more — neat, precise styling appropriate for your dog's breed.

✨

Puppy First Groom

A gentle introduction to grooming, helping puppies feel safe and relaxed from their very first visit.

🛀

Bath & Blow Dry

Refresh your dog between full grooms with a thorough wash, conditioning treatment and professional dry.

🦷

Teeth Brushing

Gentle teeth cleaning added on to any groom — keeping your dog's smile as fresh as their coat.

About Kasia

Passion for Dogs,
Pride in Every Groom

Kasia brings professionalism, warmth, and genuine love for dogs to every session. Based in Somercotes, she's become the trusted go-to groomer across Alfreton and the surrounding area.

Particularly known for her patience with nervous, timid and older dogs — Kasia takes all the time needed to build trust, so every dog leaves feeling calm, clean, and cared for.

As a fully qualified groomer, she works with all breeds and sizes — from Staffies and Spaniels to Doodles and Shih Tzus — and includes extras like teeth brushing on request.

🌹 Women-Owned ⚔️ LGBTQ+ Friendly 🐶 Nervous dog friendly ✨ All breeds welcome 🦷 Teeth brushing
